overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit urban street. The player moves from a covered walkway beneath an overpass, past glowing storefronts including a 'Brain Wash' sign and '2nd Amendment' shop, then crosses a busy intersection filled with holographic billboards and futuristic traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange textured sidewalk under the concrete overpass, passing yellow trash containers

entered.detail: purple and pink neon sign with circular logo mounted on building facade
concrete highway overpass creating a tunnel-like enclosure with geometric ceiling patterns
large industrial waste bins with yellow lids lined along the concrete wall
distinctive orange diamond-plate textured pedestrian walkway with geometric patterns
glowing digital advertisements and signs visible in the distance under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive concrete highway overpass in a futuristic city at night. The camera moves forward along an distinctive orange textured sidewalk, passing yellow industrial trash bins while neon signs including a prominent 'Brain Wash' sign glow in the distance. The environment is sheltered and enclosed with artificial neon lighting reflecting off the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone approaching open intersection under overpass

events.description: pedestrian appears walking ahead in the distance on the same sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass toward the illuminated intersection ahead, approaching a distant pedestrian

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: tall buildings with bright neon facades becoming visible at the end of the overpass

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the overpass, the scene gradually opens up as the camera approaches a brightly lit intersection in the distance. A lone pedestrian walks ahead on the orange sidewalk, and the enclosed concrete walls give way to views of neon-lit commercial buildings ahead. The overpass structure remains overhead but the environment feels less confined.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts approaching crosswalk

events.description: passing the red neon '2nd Amendment' sign on the left building facade
approaching the crosswalk markings at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking past the 2nd Amendment storefront with red neon signage, approaching the street crossing with increasing pedestrian activity

notable_agents.action: walking past the 2nd Amendment storefront on the left side
futuristic sedan driving along the multi-lane street

entered.detail: bright red neon sign reading '2ND AMENDMENT' mounted on the building wall
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
massive holographic advertisement screen displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered overpass area, the scene opens onto a commercial street lined with bright neon storefronts. The camera passes a prominent red '2nd Amendment' neon sign on the left while approaching a crosswalk. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalk and futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet asphalt, with large holographic billboards illuminating the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy multi-lane intersection with holographic advertising towers

events.description: turning right while crossing the intersection to head down a new street
navigating through moving traffic while crossing the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and turning right to continue along a new street section, avoiding vehicles

notable_agents.action: crossing the street from right to left in front of the camera
futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: elevated monorail or train track structure with glowing supports spanning the intersection
row of commercial buildings with bright neon signs lining the new street

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a wide open intersection filled with glowing holographic advertisements and elevated transit structures overhead. While crossing the asphalt crosswalk and turning right, the player navigates around pedestrians and futuristic vehicles. The scene transitions to a new street lined with neon storefronts, leaving the orange sidewalk and 2nd Amendment sign behind as the urban canyon opens up to reveal more of the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered concrete underpass into a wide, neon-drenched urban intersection. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass, moving along an orange textured sidewalk past industrial bins and the distant glow of a Brain Wash sign. As the camera advances, the enclosed concrete walls gradually give way to a more open environment, following a lone pedestrian toward a brightly lit commercial district. The scene then expands as the camera exits the overpass, passing a red 2nd Amendment sign and moving through a crowd of pedestrians and futuristic vehicles on rain-slicked asphalt. Finally, the view opens completely into a vast intersection filled with towering holographic billboards and elevated transit structures before turning onto a new street under the open night sky.
